steps.title: Identify the two opposing attitudes
steps.content: Pico honors the centrality of nature in his tribe's beliefs while simultaneously expressing distaste for being in wilderness settings. He holds reverence and aversion at the same time.

steps.title: Pick the word for "mixed/contradictory feelings"
steps.content: A noun that names holding two conflicting feelings toward something is ambivalence. The idiom is "ambivalence toward," which also fits the preposition slot.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• "responsiveness to": names only engagement, not the contradiction; also misses the distaste half. ✗
  • "ambivalence toward": precisely names simultaneous reverence and aversion. ✓
  • "renunciation of": overreach — Pico does not reject nature; he honors its centrality. ✗
  • "mastery over": unsupported — nothing in the text suggests control or expertise over nature. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
